expected_signals.summary: General Intuition argues embodied AI should shift from specialized robot models and massive real-world data collection toward general foundation models built from higher-quality data.
General Intuition raised $320 million at a $2.3 billion valuation.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: raised $320 million at a $2.3 billion valuation

expected_signals.summary: The company says its model powered a quadrupedal robot after fine-tuning on only eight minutes of real-world robotics data.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: just eight minutes of real-world robotics data

expected_signals.summary: General Intuition says it aims to provide a base model for robotics companies rather than build robots itself.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: become the foundation model of physical AI

notes: Observable proof is limited to the provided document text via the anchor quotes; there is no separate runnable verifier for this labeling task. Model-capability statements are reported as company or investor claims, not independent validation.
